title: [MTR4]Dragon's Class 308 retexture class 769

## Overview
This Resourcepack adds Dragon's class 308 retextures (Original model by Ultimate-USA-YT).

* MTR4 Only. Not compatible with MTR3

[Original model](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dragon_railway) - (The PäRail Trains Addon)
* Northern livery
* Transport for Wales livery
